mac: ⌘+I starts inline chat — ask Copilot to edit code right where your cursor is.
windows: Ctrl+I starts inline chat — ask Copilot to edit code right where your cursor is.
linux: Ctrl+I starts inline chat — ask Copilot to edit code right where your cursor is.

mac: ⌃+⌘+I opens the Copilot chat panel. Your AI pair programmer awaits.
windows: Ctrl+Alt+I opens the Copilot chat panel. Your AI pair programmer awaits.
linux: Ctrl+Alt+I opens the Copilot chat panel. Your AI pair programmer awaits.

mac: Tab accepts a Copilot suggestion. ⌥+] and ⌥+[ cycle through alternatives.
windows: Tab accepts a Copilot suggestion. Alt+] and Alt+[ cycle through alternatives.
linux: Tab accepts a Copilot suggestion. Alt+] and Alt+[ cycle through alternatives.

mac: Use #file in chat to reference a specific file as context for your question.
windows: Use #file in chat to reference a specific file as context for your question.
linux: Use #file in chat to reference a specific file as context for your question.

mac: Use #selection in chat to include your currently selected code as context.
windows: Use #selection in chat to include your currently selected code as context.
linux: Use #selection in chat to include your currently selected code as context.

mac: Agent mode can run terminal commands and edit multiple files autonomously.
windows: Agent mode can run terminal commands and edit multiple files autonomously.
linux: Agent mode can run terminal commands and edit multiple files autonomously.

mac: Type /compact in chat to summarize the conversation and free up context space.
windows: Type /compact in chat to summarize the conversation and free up context space.
linux: Type /compact in chat to summarize the conversation and free up context space.

mac: Type /fork in chat to branch your conversation and explore a new direction.
windows: Type /fork in chat to branch your conversation and explore a new direction.
linux: Type /fork in chat to branch your conversation and explore a new direction.

mac: Create .github/copilot-instructions.md to give Copilot project-specific guidance.
windows: Create .github/copilot-instructions.md to give Copilot project-specific guidance.
linux: Create .github/copilot-instructions.md to give Copilot project-specific guidance.

mac: Create .prompt.md files to build reusable prompts you can invoke from chat.
windows: Create .prompt.md files to build reusable prompts you can invoke from chat.
linux: Create .prompt.md files to build reusable prompts you can invoke from chat.

mac: Next Edit Suggestions (NES) predicts your next edit. Look for ghost text, then Tab.
windows: Next Edit Suggestions (NES) predicts your next edit. Look for ghost text, then Tab.
linux: Next Edit Suggestions (NES) predicts your next edit. Look for ghost text, then Tab.

mac: Send a steering message while the agent works to redirect it mid-task.
windows: Send a steering message while the agent works to redirect it mid-task.
linux: Send a steering message while the agent works to redirect it mid-task.

mac: ⌘+Enter in chat submits with codebase context. Better answers for workspace questions.
windows: Ctrl+Enter in chat submits with codebase context. Better answers for workspace questions.
linux: Ctrl+Enter in chat submits with codebase context. Better answers for workspace questions.

mac: Create custom agents with .agent.md files to define specialized AI personas.
windows: Create custom agents with .agent.md files to define specialized AI personas.
linux: Create custom agents with .agent.md files to define specialized AI personas.

mac: Queue messages with ⌥+Enter while the agent is working. It handles them in order.
windows: Queue messages with Alt+Enter while the agent is working. It handles them in order.
linux: Queue messages with Alt+Enter while the agent is working. It handles them in order.
